popularStory.headline: Mathieu II de Montmorency
popularStory.description:
Mathieu II de Montmorency dit le Grand Connétable († 24 novembre 1230), fils de Bouchard V de Montmorency, seigneur de Montmorency et de Laurence de Hainaut, fille du comte Baudouin IV de Hainaut.

Pe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency於1173年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希時，他的父親Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency44歲，母親Laurette de Hainaut37歲。他於1193年與Gertrude de Soissons在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1190年登記服兵役。他去世於1230年11月20日在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency于1173年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希时，他的父亲Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency44岁，母亲Laurette de Hainaut37岁。他于1193年与Gertrude de Soissons在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1190年登记服兵役。他去世于1230年11月20日在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: 'the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Great'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Margareta, a Latinate form of Margaret . As an independent given name it became fairly popular in the English-speaking world as a result of the fame of the Swedish-born film actress Greta Garbo ( 1905–92 , born Greta Louisa Gustafsson ).

variants.name: Gretta
meanings: Short form of Margareta, a Latinate form of Margaret . As an independent given name it became fairly popular in the English-speaking world as a result of the fame of the Swedish-born film actress Greta Garbo ( 1905–92 , born Greta Louisa Gustafsson ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency was born in 1173, in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, his father, Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency, was 44 and his mother, Laurette de Hainaut, was 37. He married Gertrude de Soissons in 1193, in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1190. He died on 20 November 1230, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency est né en 1173, à Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Laurette de Hainaut, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude de Soissons en 1193, à Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1190. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency 1173 in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency 44 und seine Mutter Laurette de Hainaut 37. Er hat 1193 in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich Gertrude de Soissons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1190 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 20. November 1230 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency è nato il nel 1173 nel Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Laurette de Hainaut, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude de Soissons nel 1193, nel Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1190. Morì il 20 novembre 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorencyが1173年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼサルセレスモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorencyは44歳，母Laurette de Hainautは37歳であった。1193年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼサルセレスモントモーエンシでGertrude de Soissonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年に兵役登録をした。彼は1230年11月20日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency(이)가 1173년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 사르셀레스 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Laurette de Hainaut(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1193년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 사르셀레스 몽모렌시에서 Gertrude de Soissons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1230년 11월 20일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency nasceu em 1173, em Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Laurette de Hainaut, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrude de Soissons em 1193, em Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1190. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency родился в 1173 г. в местности монтморенси, сарселлесь, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Laurette de Hainaut, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude de Soissons в 1193 г. в местности монтморенси, сарселлесь, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1190 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 20 ноября 1230 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency nació en 1173, en Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Bouchard V de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Laurette de Hainaut, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Gertrude de Soissons en 1193, en Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1190. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
